voice.personality: speaks to the person who refuses to waste time — every word earns its place
do: Use imperative language — command the reader to act
Make every minute feel like a choice with consequences
dont: Don't over-explain — respect the reader's intelligence
sample_phrases: Win The Hour. Then the next one.
Your time isn't managed. It's owned.
The hour doesn't wait. Neither should you.

aida.attention_hook: a sharp truth about time, wasted hours, or the cost of drift
aida.interest: what winning each hour actually looks like in practice
aida.desire: the version of yourself that controls their time instead of reacting to it
aida.action: download the app / start your first hour
